prestazioni: Replace the stock 5.0L 1GZ-FE V12 (32-valve DOHC, 280 PS) with a fully built version featuring forged internals: JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei. Pair with a custom 3.5L dry-sump system from HKS to eliminate oil starvation during high-G cornering.

Install a custom twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R turbos (88mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves. Use a custom air-to-water intercooler from PWR with a 3.5L ice reservoir for consistent intake temps under repeated boost cycles.

Swap the stock 6-speed automatic for a 6-speed sequential transmission from Holinger (model RD60) with a Sachs twin-disc carbon clutch. Integrate a Quaife ATB differential with a 3.909 final drive ratio and a custom 4WD conversion using a Toyota Land Cruiser 200 transfer case (part-time 4WD) for optimal torque distribution.
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a custom widebody kit from Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Century G50 kit), featuring carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and a custom 3-piece rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps from APR Performance.

Install a full custom interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point design with integrated harness bars). Replace the stock wood trim with carbon fiber dash panels from Varis and a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch OLED display).

Fit custom 22-inch forged wheels from Work Meister S1 3P (9.5J front, 11J rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R22 front, 305/25 R22 rear). Add a custom air suspension system from Air Lift Performance (3P management) with adjustable camber plates from BC Racing for aggressive stance and track alignment.
